title: Email Client — Requirements Discovery
description: Before drafting a functional spec, the agent needs structured input across many dimensions. This form exercises every supported question type so you can see what's possible. Answer below; on Submit you'll get a JSON payload to hand back to the agent.

questions.text: What should we call this project? (a short codename works)
Describe the product in 2–3 sentences as if you were pitching it.
questions.hint: Focus on user value, not implementation.

options: Individual power user (heavy keyboard, many accounts)

questions.text: Which platforms must ship at v1? (select all that apply)
Which existing client is the closest visual/UX reference?
How aggressive should the AI features be?
How confident are you that AI features will be a differentiator?
Must the app work fully offline?
Is there a hard launch date?
What is explicitly OUT of scope for v1? Anything the agent should NOT build.
Attach a sketch / mockup if you have one (optional)
questions.hint: Describe what you're attaching, or upload an image.

questions.text: What worries you most about this project?
